rationale: Elec. Code §258.008 governs indication of Code of Fair Campaign Practices on political advertising. It has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote: A candidate or a political committee that has filed a copy of the Code of Fair Campaign Practices may so indicate on political advertising in a form to be determined by the commission.
_note: No overlap between proposed Tax Code change and this Election Code provision.
